sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n80064" key="patrole/twr" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πατρ-ολέτωρ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ορος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n80064.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">parricide,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11.348</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antiphan.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
